title: HoodFlow — Markets on Robinhood Chain
tagline: Discovers lifecycle-aware Virtuals markets and builds self-custody routes through the settlement token that is actually liquid
description: HoodFlow is a self-custody market interface for Robinhood Chain. It reads Virtuals launch lifecycle data, routes bonding-stage markets through VIRTUAL, and switches graduated tokens to live liquid pairs when an executable route exists. The public proof pins a USDG-to-VIRTUAL-to-KARMA quote to a specific mainnet block so reviewers can reproduce the route inputs and output.

visual.title: route the market that is live

artifacts.label: Watch the 30-second HoodFlow product tour on X
Block-pinned USDG to VIRTUAL to KARMA route proof

feedbackPrompts: Which additional Virtuals lifecycle states should the adapter expose to users?
Would a reusable quote-only API make HoodFlow routes more useful to Virtuals agents?
Which mainnet route proofs would help reviewers verify graduated-token execution fastest?
